revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:String|match|s={{PAGENAME}}|pattern=^%d%d%d%d songs$|start=1|match=1|plain=false|nomatch=%%nomatch%%}}|%%nomatch%%|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:YYYY songs category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYYY songs", where YYYY is a 4-digit year (e.g. 1998)}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{Portal|Music|{{FindYDCportal|{{Title year}}}}}}{{Category explanation|'''[[song]]s''' written or first produced in the '''year [[{{Title year}}]]'''}} {{Category series navigation|skip-gaps=yes}} {{Category see also if exists|{{Title year}} singles|{{Title year}} albums|{{Title year}} EPs}} [[Category:{{Title year}} works|Songs]] [[Category:{{DECADE|{{Title year}}}} songs|{{Title year}}]] [[Category:Songs by year|{{Title year}}]] [[Category:{{Title year}} in music|Songs]]}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:YYYY songs category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form "YYYY songs", where YYYY is a 4-digit year (e.g. 1998)}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}}{{Automatic category TOC}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 7 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
